texto: I have heard that he who knows what is enough will not let himself be entangled by thoughts of gain
autor: that he who really understands how to find satisfaction will not be afraid of other kinds of loss
explicacao: Citação de that he who really understands how to find satisfaction will not be afraid of other kinds of loss sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “I have heard that he who knows what is enough will not let himself be entangled by thoughts of gain” articula motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
